problem id: 2aa0fadc
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  11110101 -> 01001111
  10010100 -> 00001001
  01010110 -> 10000101
  11110100 -> 00001111
  00011011 -> 11000001
  01101100 -> 00000110
  10111000 -> 00001011
  00010001 -> 01000001

query: 00111011
predicted answer: 11000011
